title: Symbolic analysis of simplified Berton 2023 model

content.text:
<skill name="grill-me" location="[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]">
References are relative to [REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]

Interview me relentlessly about every aspect of this plan until we reach a shared understanding. Walk down each branch of the design tree, resolving dependencies between decisions one-by-one. For each question, provide your recommended answer.

Ask the questions one at a time.

If a question can be answered by exploring the codebase, explore the codebase instead.
</skill>

Read @docs/berton_3d_hopf_briefing.md and create backlog issues to cover all of the tasks described there.

Created 6 backlog tasks from `docs/berton_3d_hopf_briefing.md`:

- `TASK-001` — Symbolic Jacobian and characteristic polynomial
- `TASK-002` — Baseline parameter extraction and numerical root tracking
- `TASK-003` — Singular-limit slow dynamics via two routes
- `TASK-004` — Hopf locus and sign conclusions
- `TASK-005` — Symbolic-vs-finite-difference Jacobian validation
- `TASK-006` — Final go/no-go Markdown report

I also added dependencies:

- `TASK-002` depends on `TASK-001`
- `TASK-003` depends on `TASK-001`, `TASK-002`
- `TASK-004` depends on `TASK-001`–`TASK-003`
- `TASK-005` depends on `TASK-001`, `TASK-002`
- `TASK-006` depends on `TASK-001`–`TASK-005`

All tasks reference the briefing doc and include acceptance criteria.
